Background.description:
Your background knowledge and skills might prove useful during your adventures.

Work with the GM to determine if your background provides you advantages in a given situation.
Background.name: Background

0sch8KZYnpLbEJkz.description: Roll a Patron Boon from any patron; an unexplained gift

Roll Random Character.description: - Pick one Weapon (See Weapons compendium) - Pick Leather Armor if you can wear it (See Armor compendium)
Roll Random Character.name: Roll Random Character

1-1.description: A mutated @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.nhKDBbnOnXXTzfBr]{Cave Brute} explodes through a crumbling wall

2-3.description: A silent @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.udRspLiTyURGmLav]{Gelatinous Cube} sweeps up a corridor

4-5.description: A roving @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.RG84tprafQTDEFCa]{Brown Bear} scavenges for dead bodies to eat

6-7.description: Rival crawlers confront the PCs; they were "here first"

8-9.description: [[/r 1d6]] @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.qISCrzLvHr4uQ9Q8]{Rust Monsters} swarm a crack bubbling with mercury

10-11.description: A legless suit of @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.qSeHWgP59WltutCz]{Animated Armor} pulls itself along the floor

12-13.description: A groaning wall collapses at the slightest touch

14-15.description: A chalk note on the wall: "Karov, we'll be at the Loyal Hog"

16-17.description: Mort the goblin is digging in cracks for grubs and beetles

18-19.description: The floor collapses into a pit [[/r 1d6*10]] feet deep

20-21.description: A raiding team of [[/r 2d4]] @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.uqHIz56KiBwTnbTJ]{Hobgoblins} moves in tight formation

24-25.description: [[/r 1d4]] @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.99s2guSyYKPWp1oy]{Giant Dung Beetles} roll huge balls of dried excrement

26-27.description: An @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.QErMaMVIbddgk9MX]{Ochre Jelly} hides inside a pond or sinkhole

28-29.description: A single, perfect rose grows up between the flagstones

30-31.description: [[/r 2d4]] @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.AMSI3MCLvpcZpJPO]{Bandits} shutter lanterns and set up a hasty ambush

32-33.description: Three @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.I7CMFbyFmFHVwE5U]{Goblins} toughen each other's skulls with frying pans

34-35.description: [[/r 2d6]] @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.k8tAgECWIzPIStGU]{Beastmen} pummel a giant centipede with rocks

36-37.description: A gas leak causes all light sources to explode and go out

38-39.description: A @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.udRspLiTyURGmLav]{Gelatinous Cube} full of handy items is stuck inside a pit

40-41.description: A swarm of clattering, @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.U9moCUg8DnL6C0Sq]{Gold Scarab Beetles} flies into sight

42-43.description: A wounded NPC staggers up to the PCs and begs for help

44-45.description: A rusty portcullis slams down, separating the PCs

46-47.description: A @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.p9PayU4K9nBZ8JRl]{Giant Spider} hides above an old, rotten backpack

48-49.description: A weeping @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.LV2ZWlK1qUQz5J4K]{Ghost} floats by, distracted by its own ranting

50-53.description: [[/r 2d4]] @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.BxilUr9Ac6zgekYU]{Kobolds} sneak up behind the PCs for a surprise attack

54-55.description: Ancient clay pots vibrate with hypnotizing resonance

56-57.description: [[/r 1d6]] @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.Jn5JjEPCUT86txAg]{Gricks} shred dead giant rats and use the fur for nesting

58-59.description: Rival crawlers escort a frail noble tourist on an "adventure"

60-61.description: [[/r 3d4]] @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.I7CMFbyFmFHVwE5U]{Goblin} scavengers barter and trade for odd trinkets

62-63.description: [[/r 2d4]] dwarven miners (@UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.Kw5KEyZVy5ugaTTy]{Soldiers}) shore up a collapsing wall

64-65.description: [[/r 2d4]] @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.K9M3BA8PlvYWFADe]{Giant Wasps} build a huge, papery nest on the ceiling

66-67.description: A dense cloud of sulfuric mist rises from a floor crack

68-69.description: A @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.rwE58nsTLAG7pW1u]{Swarm of Spiders} surges out of a gauzy egg sack

70-71.description: An @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.VrYTiPjDOH1LIEBr]{Ogre} named Lud scratches rude words into the wall

74-75.description: [[/r 2d4]]@UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.EJ94w4A9mb9ETSGA]{Giant Bats} roost on the ceiling; light disturbs them

76-77.description: An @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.fcgq7uwsJEMMdRNx]{Ettercap} spins web cocoons around its still-living prey

78-79.description: [[/r 1d6]] @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.CpHttsoemSoZRiDe]{Cultists} hunt for humanoid bones for a nefarious ritual

80-81.description: A @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.vXaqgfDykZPdXnIm]{Dryad} searches for her tree that bugbears chopped up

82-83.description: A @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.WMw4J1wECaLGf3Am]{Deep Gnome} plays haunting music on humming fungi

84-85.description: [[/r 2d6]] @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.BxilUr9Ac6zgekYU]{Kobolds} work in a makeshift, volatile alchemy lab

86-87.description: A @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.zLDg6vIYEj4wB0lQ]{Stone Golem} endlessly stacks the same rocks into piles

88-89.description: Two @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.0JAEN5FsKjaXXZaA]{Darkmantles} circle each other in a duel of intimidation

90-91.description: [[/r 2d6]] @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.I7CMFbyFmFHVwE5U]{Goblins} carry their bugbear king on a rickety litter

94-95.description: A recent campfire still burns with glowing cinders

96-97.description: A @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.monsters.c3Nvj86e0Layz3NG]{Minotaur} guides a mysterious merchant along a path

98-99.description: Roll two encounters and combine the results (reroll 98-99)

100-100.description: The body of a dead crawler holds a random magic item

1-1.description: An armored beast the size of a ship is rampaging nearby

2-3.description: A team of assassins is on its way to kill your group

4-5.description: The local ruler has placed a 2,000 gp bounty on your heads

6-7.description: The cult of Shune is planning a fiery coup at midnight

8-9.description: An ancient, stone door has been found in the castle cellar

10-11.description: Lizardfolk have been raiding caravans near the swamp

12-13.description: Armored skeletons are roaming the misty graveyard

14-15.description: An earthquake uncovered a ruin inside a deep rift

16-17.description: A warband of orcs has taken over an abandoned keep

18-19.description: There is a hall of golden statues underneath the well

20-21.description: Those who survive the Trial of the Lotus gain a strange gift

22-23.description: A Captain of the Guard has been taken hostage by thugs

24-25.description: The Crystal Caves are home to a cult of psychic sorcerers

26-27.description: A crocodile dragged a richly-laden mule into the sewers

28-29.description: A fortune-telling witch speaks true omens and portents

30-31.description: Every full moon, the Prancing Unicorn's larder is robbed

32-33.description: A famous group of crawlers hasn't returned from a delve

34-35.description: A glowing meteor crashed deep inside the marshlands

36-37.description: Fire will not light or burn within sight of the Lion Fountain

38-39.description: The lost Jewel of Barbalt is hidden in the Howling Caves

40-41.description: A dwarven mining team has uncovered a tentacled statue

42-43.description: The Red Owl tavern has a trapdoor to the Shadowdark

44-45.description: Viperian warriors guard a shrine to a medusa in the jungle

46-47.description: Three thieves just pulled off a gemstone heist nearby

48-49.description: Harpies keep watch from the cliffs around Diridia's Tomb

50-53.description: A gorgon stalks the ruins of the Underhill Halls

54-55.description: Beneath the Red Abbey is the forgotten Barrow of Ur-Din

56-57.description: A dying sage is calling for a mighty group of heroes

58-59.description: A wizard accidentally let his trio of cockatrices escape

60-61.description: A local lord has somehow been stranded atop a high roof

62-63.description: Bartomeu the Pirate Prince will be hanged at noon

64-65.description: Goblin spelunkers found an underground cathedral

66-67.description: A Kytherian Cog was lost in the sea near Myrkhos

68-69.description: Rare and valuable mushrooms grow inside an old crypt

70-71.description: The Church of St. Terragnis will pay for the return of a relic

72-73.description: A volcanic eruption revealed tunnels in the caldera's walls

74-75.description: The cyclopean ruins of Tal-Yool lie deep within the forest

76-77.description: A famous gambler will bet a ruby on a Wizard Thief game

78-79.description: The Moon Druids will bless a sword used to slay a werewolf

80-81.description: Gravediggers found a chained coffin in an unmarked plot

82-83.description: An abandoned wizard's tower is full of clockwork creatures

84-85.description: The Thieves' Guild is about to attack a rival merchant lord

86-87.description: Windstorms uncovered a stone monolith in the desert

88-89.description: A rival group of crawlers found the map to Jiraal's Hoard

90-91.description: A monstrosity called The Oracle lurks below the university

92-93.description: The Ophidian Armor is in Ekmara's Keep in the wasteland

94-95.description: The princess has been kidnapped by a group of sorcerers

96-97.description: A Chaos Knight's tomb has been found beneath a temple

98-99.description: The fabled Library of Gehemna appeared outside the city

100-100.description: The dragon Ixamir has awoken from her 200-year slumber

1-1.description: The ground shakes violently and a massive fissure opens

2-3.description: An unseen foe leaps out of hiding at close range

4-5.description: A horrible buzzing fills the air, growing louder and louder

6-7.description: You catch the acrid smell of smoke and flame

8-9.description: A bright star appears in the sky, visible even at midday

10-11.description: You spot a half-open bag with gold coins glinting inside

12-13.description: A man slips a note and an odd potion into your hand

14-15.description: Someone observing you from afar steps out of sight

16-17.description: A dwarf in a red hat hands you a rose, bows, and leaves

18-19.description: A cowled stranger in a black cloak approaches you

20-21.description: Someone tries to pick your pocket

22-23.description: A strange ticking sound comes from inside your bag

24-25.description: A frothing, frantic horse with a saddle but no rider appears

26-27.description: A mound in the earth quickly burrows toward you

28-29.description: You sense you are being magically scryed upon

30-31.description: Someone tries to plant an object on your person

32-33.description: You are filled with a strong sense of dread and danger

34-35.description: A woman hands you a black cat and then runs away

36-37.description: A small, woodland creature jumps out of a backpack

38-39.description: You smell lilacs and hear faint, ghostly laughter

40-41.description: A note wrapped around a thin dagger lands next to you

42-43.description: A green-glowing meteor streaks through the sky

44-45.description: Someone nearby is staring at you and mouthing words

46-47.description: A pair of yellow eyes watches you from the darkness

48-49.description: An orc with an arrow in her back crashes through a door

50-53.description: You hear a beast cry out in pain just up ahead

54-55.description: A huge swarm of bats crashes over you and swirls away

56-57.description: A frail beggar whispers that he has a secret to tell you

58-59.description: An object falls from above and barely misses your head

60-61.description: A seagull lands on your head and coughs up an odd bottle

62-63.description: The smell of ozone rises and electricity crackles in the air

64-65.description: You spot a trail of tiny silver coins leading around a bend

66-67.description: A wild-eyed man approaches with a holy book held high

70-71.description: A stampede of wild animals bursts into view

72-73.description: An old woman points at you and yells, "There they are!"

74-75.description: A passing stranger presses an ancient coin into your hand

76-77.description: A chorus of howls echo in the distance

78-79.description: Two pinching and slapping goblins tumble into sight

80-81.description: You realize you are not alone; something is behind you

82-83.description: The sudden sound of rushing water crashes toward you

84-85.description: You hear an ear-splitting scream that nobody else hears

86-87.description: A man slaps you with a glove and throws it at your feet

88-89.description: A violent, windy storm kicks up without warning

90-91.description: Lightning strikes close and leaves a glowing object behind

92-93.description: A multicolored orb drifts up to you and then zips away

94-95.description: A runaway wagon crashes toward you

96-97.description: An NPC throws off their disguise, revealing an enemy

98-99.description: A demon appears to you and presents a tempting offer

100-100.description: A radiant being appears to you with a message of warning

8-9.description: Rusty lantern with shattered glass (1 gp)

22-23.description: 10 gp in a moldy, wood box

26-27.description: Longbow and bundle of 40 arrows (10 gp)

28-29.description: Dusty, leather armor dyed black (10 gp)

34-35.description: 12 gp in the pocket of a ripped cloak

42-43.description: Obsidian statuette of Shune the Vile (15 gp)

48-49.description: Bag of 10 silver spikes (2 gp each)

50-53.description: Mithral locket with a painting of a halfling (20 gp)

54-55.description: Two finely forged dwarven shields (20 gp)

56-57.description: Pair of silvered daggers (10 gp each)

60-61.description: Bundle of five red dragon scales (5 gp each)

62-63.description: Light, warm cloak woven of spidersilk (25 gp)

64-65.description: Fine set of ivory game pieces (25 gp)

68-69.description: Matched trio of warhammers (10 gp each)

72-73.description: Set of silk slippers and a robe (35 gp)

78-79.description: Mithral shield etched with soaring dragons (40 gp)

80-81.description: Gold monkey idol with a ruby gripped in its teeth (60 gp)

1-1.description: Devastation! Roll twice and combine both effects (reroll any further 1s).

3-3.description: Refraction! You target yourself with the spell

4-4.description: Your hand slipped! You target a random ally with the spell

5-5.description: Mind wound! You can't cast this spell again for a week

6-6.description: Discorporation! One random piece of your gear disappears forever

7-7.description: Spell worm! You lose the ability to cast a random spell on each of your turns until you pass a [[check 12 con]] check. You regain the ability to cast those spells after completing a rest

8-8.description: Harmonic failure! You lose the ability to cast a random spell until you complete a rest

9-9.description: Poof! You suppress all light within a near distance from you, including sunlight and magical light, for 10 rounds

10-10.description: The horror! You scream uncontrollably for 3 rounds in Primordial, drawing lots of attention

11-11.description: Energy surge! You glow bright purple for 10 rounds, granting enemies advantage on attacks against you

12-12.description: Unstable conduit! You have disadvantage on casting spells of the same tier for 10 rounds

1-1.description: Devastation! Roll twice and combine both effects (Ignore if rolled more than once more).

2-2.description: Blast radius! You and all near creatures take [[/r 2d6]] damage

3-3.description: Duplicate refraction! You target yourself and the nearest ally with two identical copies of the spell

4-4.description: You flubbed the incantation! You cast a random spell from your known spells at the same targets, even if it would not normally be possible

5-5.description: Ethereal bandersnatch! Two random pieces of your gear disappear forever

6-6.description: Arcano-mutagenesis! You must pass a [[check 12 con]] check or a random stat drops to 3 (-4) until you successfully complete a rest

7-7.description: Boom! You open a 30-foot deep sinkhole in the ground with you at the center. You and all near creatures must pass a [[check 15 dex]] check or fall in

8-8.description: Petrification! [[/r 1d4]] of your limbs petrify for the next 24 hours

9-9.description: Stupefaction! You lose the ability to cast all spells of the same tier until you complete a rest

10-10.description: It cannot be unseen! You must pass a [[check 12 wis]] check or descend into mad raving for [[/r 1d10]] rounds

11-11.description: Radioactive energies!You whirl with repulsive energies, drawing the hostility and attacks of all enemies who can see you for the next [[/r 1d4]] rounds

12-12.description: Uncontained channeling! You have disadvantage on casting spells of the same tier and lower for 10 rounds

1-1.description: Devastation! Roll twice and combine both effects (reroll any further 1s).

2-2.description: Pyroclastic extrusion! You deal [[/r 3d8]] damage to yourself and all creatures within near

3-3.description: Astral incision! An otherworldly blade cuts into your memory. You permanently forget one random spell

4-4.description: The grimlow! You accidentally summon a hostile grimlow in a space near to you. It persists for 2d4 rounds before disappearing whence it came

5-5.description: Dark plasma aura! Attacks against you pass through a vile aura, dealing double damage for the next [[/r 2d6]] rounds

6-6.description: Gate! You open a magic portal to another location, whether on this plane or another. Something dreadful will come through in [[/r 1d4]] rounds unless you close it with a [[check 18 int]] check on your turn

7-7.description: Runaway arcana loop! Your spell targets a random creature you can see, even if it would not normally be possible. Each subsequent turn, you must pass a spellcasting check for that spell or you cast it on another random creature in the same way (effect ends on success)

8-8.description: Arcane obstruction! You lose the ability to cast all spells of a random tier until you complete a rest

9-9.description: What lurks beyond the veil! You must pass a [[check 15 wis]] check or fall into mad raving for [[/r 1d4]] hours

10-10.description: Ord's balance! You must either permanently sacrifice a magic item or the ability to cast a tier 3+ spell you know

11-11.description: Unmitigated chain reaction! You have disadvantage on casting all spells for the next 10 rounds

12-12.description: Shred! You tear a large hole in the fabric of the universe close to you; the lightless tear grows larger every round
